semantic.role: Vitest test suite for SpineDB batch commit operations and transaction integrity.
responsibilities: Mocks SQLite prepare method to intercept and validate batch commit SQL statements.
Validates that batch commits roll back on constraint violations.
Creates temporary test directories and cleans up after each test.
Asserts that batch operations maintain atomicity and error handling.
outOfScope: Unit testing of individual SpineDB methods outside batch commit context.
Integration testing with real database instances.
Performance or load testing of batch operations.
invariants: Test files must end with .test.ts or .spec.ts (Rule: test-file-suffix).

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Provide automated regression coverage for SpineDB batch commit atomicity and error recovery.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: Finalize v1.0.0 release closure; no specific changes to this test file detected.

English.role: Vitest test suite for SpineDB batch commit operations and transaction integrity.
responsibilities: Mocks SQLite prepare method to intercept and validate batch commit SQL statements.
Validates that batch commits roll back on constraint violations.
Creates temporary test directories and cleans up after each test.
Asserts that batch operations maintain atomicity and error handling.
outOfScope: Unit testing of individual SpineDB methods outside batch commit context.
Integration testing with real database instances.
Performance or load testing of batch operations.

Simplified Chinese.role: SpineDB 批量提交操作与事务完整性的 Vitest 测试套件。
responsibilities: 模拟 SQLite 的 prepare 方法，以拦截并验证批量提交的 SQL 语句。
验证批量提交在遇到约束违反时能够正确回滚。
在每个测试前后创建并清理临时测试目录。
断言批量操作保持原子性和正确的错误处理。
outOfScope: 对批量提交上下文之外的单个 SpineDB 方法进行单元测试。
使用真实数据库实例进行集成测试。
批量操作的性能或负载测试。
